countries.next_valid_move: Add current monitored official sources, category templates, and qualified review before country-specific claims.

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove CARM registration, accounting setup, duty payment readiness, or customs advice.
source_provenance.evidence_role: commercial importer duty and tax account workflow
source_provenance.name: CBSA Assessment and Revenue Management (CARM)

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not replace CBSA, broker, customs, or legal review.
source_provenance.name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; classification and tariff treatment require qualified review.
source_provenance.name: CBSA Customs Tariff 2026

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; product-specific food import compliance requires qualified review and source verification.
source_provenance.name: CFIA Automated Import Reference System (AIRS)

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove whether a specific product requires an import permit.
source_provenance.name: Global Affairs Canada Import Controls and Import Permits

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; legal interpretation and product applicability require qualified review.
source_provenance.name: Justice Laws Import Control List

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; screening results require dated search records and reviewer signoff.
source_provenance.name: Global Affairs Canada Consolidated Canadian Autonomous Sanctions List

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove market size, buyer demand, or revenue.
source_provenance.name: ISED Trade Data Online

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove buyer validation, supplier fit, customs advice, or freshness of a specific product row.
source_provenance.name: Canadian Importers Database

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove a broker relationship, review, or signoff.
source_provenance.name: CBSA Licensed Customs Brokers

packet_coverage.next_valid_move: Use generic readiness output unless both countries and category have monitored/expert-reviewed coverage.

proof_boundary: Coverage tiers describe product support level only; they do not prove country-specific legal, customs, tariff, or compliance correctness.

tier_definitions.label: selectable only
tier_definitions.support: Country can be selected in generic product flows only.

tier_definitions.label: generic starter checklist
tier_definitions.minimum_evidence: Country appears in a packet but lacks monitored official sources.
tier_definitions.support: Generic import/export checklist language may be shown.

tier_definitions.label: reference sources catalogued
tier_definitions.minimum_evidence: At least one official or official-adjacent source is catalogued.
tier_definitions.support: Reference sources can orient research, with claim gates closed.

tier_definitions.label: monitored sources
tier_definitions.minimum_evidence: Multiple official sources are recorded with access dates.
tier_definitions.support: Multiple official sources are tracked for internal review prompts.

tier_definitions.label: category template support
tier_definitions.minimum_evidence: Country, category, and route templates are maintained.
tier_definitions.support: Category-specific templates can be prepared for expert review.

tier_definitions.label: expert-reviewed templates
tier_definitions.minimum_evidence: Current official sources, category templates, and qualified review are attached.
tier_definitions.support: Expert-reviewed templates may support scoped country-specific product copy.
